title: Nursery Rhyme. CCVI. Riddles.
content:
Thomas a Tattamus took two Ts,
        To tie two tups to two tall trees,
        To frighten the terrible Thomas a Tattamus!
        Tell me how many Ts there are in all THAT.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCVI. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
